title: Hybridization-capture for nanopore sequencing
author: Isac Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zxyf7pw

steps.title: Split 40 ul eluate to 2 x 20 μL
steps.instruction: Split 40 ul eluate to 2 x 20 μL

steps.title: Shear 3-5 μg DNA in 100...
steps.instruction: Shear 3-5 μg DNA in 100 μL to ~2kb using the following settings on Diagenode bioruptor pico : 5 cycles, 4 sec on / 30 sec off

steps.title: Split into two reactions to maximize...
steps.instruction: Split into two reactions to maximize the efficacy of the reactions.

steps.title: Mix the following components in a...
steps.instruction: Mix the following components in a sterile, nuclease-free tube: %s %s

steps.title: Combine two reactions together in preparation for AMPure XP cleanup
steps.instruction: Combine two reactions together in preparation for AMPure XP cleanup.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler : 30 minutes at 20°C 30 minutes at 65°C hold at 4°C 01:00:00

steps.title: Add 65 μL of AMPure beads...
steps.instruction: Add 65 μL of AMPure beads (1X v/v ratio) at room temperature.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature. 00:05:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Spin down briefly on a minifuge...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly on a minifuge and place on a magnetic rack until beads separate out of the solution.

steps.title: Carefully remove the supernatant, making sure...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the supernatant, making sure not to remove the beads.

steps.title: Keeping the tube on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Keeping the tube on the magnetic rack, add 200 μL of 70 % ethanol in nuclease free water, being careful not to disturb the bead pellet.

steps.title: Incubate for at least 30 seconds at room temperature 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Incubate for at least 30 seconds at room temperature 00:00:30

steps.title: Repeat the wash steps (steps 9-11)...
steps.instruction: Repeat the wash steps (steps 9-11) for a total of two washes, and remove the supernatant (step 9).

steps.title: Spin down on a minifuge to...
steps.instruction: Spin down on a minifuge to pellet the residual ethanol, place on the magnetic rack, and remove the residual ethanol using a P10 pipet.

steps.title: Resuspend in 27 μL of nuclease-free...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 27 μL of nuclease-free water (25 + 2 to account for transfer loss.)

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature 00:10:00 Undetermined
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature 00:10:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Spin down briefly on a minifuge...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly on a minifuge and place on a magnetic rack until beads separate out of the solution.

steps.title: Retain the supernatant, which now contains the eluted DNA
steps.instruction: Retain the supernatant, which now contains the eluted DNA.

steps.title: Add all reagents together as follows
steps.instruction: Add all reagents together as follows: %s %s

steps.title: Carefully mix the reagents by pipetting up and down
steps.instruction: Carefully mix the reagents by pipetting up and down.

steps.title: Briefly spin down in a microfuge
steps.instruction: Briefly spin down in a microfuge.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler, 20C for 15...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler, 20C for 15 minutes, then hold at 4C. 00:15:00 Undetermined

steps.title: You can pause at this step...
steps.instruction: You can pause at this step and store the library at -20C

steps.title: Purify the adapted DNA with 1
steps.instruction: Purify the adapted DNA with 1.8X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 32 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.

steps.title: Use 0
steps.instruction: Use 0.75% cassette high-pass for size selection protocol. (estimated time 45 minutes) 00:45:00

steps.title: Let it sit ~45 min after elution for best recovery
steps.instruction: Let it sit ~45 min after elution for best recovery. 00:45:00

steps.title: Add all reagents together as follows for two reactions
steps.instruction: Add all reagents together as follows for two reactions: %s %s

steps.title: Carefully mix the reagents by inverting a few times
steps.instruction: Carefully mix the reagents by inverting a few times.

steps.title: Briefly spin the reagents down on a minifuge
steps.instruction: Briefly spin the reagents down on a minifuge.

steps.title: Amplify using the following cycling conditions
steps.instruction: Amplify using the following cycling conditions: 03:00:00 %s %s

steps.title: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure...
steps.instruction: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 15 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.

steps.title: Mix together these reagents to make...
steps.instruction: Mix together these reagents to make Hyb buffer, volumes given are for one reaction: %s %s

steps.title: Make SureSelect Block Mix
steps.instruction: Make SureSelect Block Mix. %s %s

steps.title: Prepare RNAse block solution by diluting...
steps.instruction: Prepare RNAse block solution by diluting the RNAse block 1:10 with nuclease free water. (7 μL needed per reaction)

steps.title: In a strip tube, add 3
steps.instruction: In a strip tube, add 3.4 μL gDNA to 5.6 ul SureSelect block mix

steps.title: Mix by pipetting, and denature the...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting, and denature the DNA on a thermocycler by incubating at 95C for 5 minutes, followed by incubationg at 65C for at least 5 minutes 00:10:00

steps.title: Meanwhile, make the capture library mix
steps.instruction: Meanwhile, make the capture library mix : %s %s

steps.title: Keep at room temperature briefly, and...
steps.instruction: Keep at room temperature briefly, and add to the denatured DNA while the DNA is still on the thermocycler

steps.title: Incubate for 16 or 24 hours...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 16 or 24 hours at 65C with heated lid at 105C. 16:00:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Prewarm SureSelectXT Wash buffer #2 at 65C
steps.instruction: Prewarm SureSelectXT Wash buffer #2 at 65C.

steps.title: Vigorously resuspend MyOne Streptavidin T1 beads on a vortex mixer
steps.instruction: Vigorously resuspend MyOne Streptavidin T1 beads on a vortex mixer.

steps.title: Add 50 μL beads (per rxn) to a 1
steps.instruction: Add 50 μL beads (per rxn) to a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 200 μL of SureSelect Binding buffer
steps.instruction: Add 200 μL of SureSelect Binding buffer.

steps.title: Mix the beads on a vortex mixer for 5 seconds
steps.instruction: Mix the beads on a vortex mixer for 5 seconds.

steps.title: Put the tubes into a magnetic rack
steps.instruction: Put the tubes into a magnetic rack

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat above for a total of 3 washes
steps.instruction: Repeat above for a total of 3 washes.

steps.title: Resuspend the beads in 200 μL of SureSelectXT Binding buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads in 200 μL of SureSelectXT Binding buffer

steps.title: Take out hybridization mixture from thermal...
steps.instruction: Take out hybridization mixture from thermal cycler, add directly to bead solution, invert 3-5X to mix. *If less than 20 μL hyb mixture remains after incubation, be wary of suboptimal capture performance.

steps.title: Incubate hybrid-bait/bead solution on tube rotator...
steps.instruction: Incubate hybrid-bait/bead solution on tube rotator at 10 rpm top-to-bottom for 30 minutes at room temperature. If sample is not properly mixing, mix with heat using a thermomixer at 30 C 800 rpm. 00:30:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Briefly spin down on a minifuge
steps.instruction: Briefly spin down on a minifuge.

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack, remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack, remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend in 500 μL wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 500 μL wash buffer I by vortexing for 5 seconds

steps.title: Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature, occasionally mixing
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature, occasionally mixing. 00:15:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Spin down briefly on a minifuge,...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly on a minifuge, place on magnetic rack, and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend beads in 200 μL 65C...
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in 200 μL 65C prewarmed wash buffer, mix on a vortex mixer for 5 seconds to resuspend beads.

steps.title: Incubate 10 minutes at 65C 00:10:00 Undetermined
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 minutes at 65C 00:10:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Briefly spin down on a minifuge,...
steps.instruction: Briefly spin down on a minifuge, place on magnetic rack, and discard supernatant. Repeat the wash steps for a total of 3 washes.

steps.title: Remove all wash buffer
steps.instruction: Remove all wash buffer

steps.title: Add 30 μL nuclease free water...
steps.instruction: Add 30 μL nuclease free water to each sample, pipet to resuspend. Keep samples on ice until next use.

steps.title: Assemble PCR reaction, 2 for each capture reaction
steps.instruction: Assemble PCR reaction, 2 for each capture reaction : %s %s

steps.title: Amplify using the following cycling conditions
steps.instruction: Amplify using the following cycling conditions: 02:30:00 %s %s

steps.title: Perform NEBNext Ultra II End-Repiar/dA-tailing in 60 μL
steps.instruction: Perform NEBNext Ultra II End-Repiar/dA-tailing in 60 μL.

steps.title: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure...
steps.instruction: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 30 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.

steps.title: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure...
steps.instruction: Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute n 30 μL nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Ligate on adaptors using NEB Blunt/TA Ligase Master Mix
steps.instruction: Ligate on adaptors using NEB Blunt/TA Ligase Master Mix.

steps.title: Purify the adptor-ligated DNA following the protocol's specifications
steps.instruction: Purify the adptor-ligated DNA following the protocol's specifications.

steps.title: Load on ONT MinION following the...
steps.instruction: Load on ONT MinION following the protocol's specifications and sequence for up to 48 hours.
